text:
- [escalation] Andy: Newsletter or blog post from Andrew Lang about belonging and community.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow run failed.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves pipeline alert about permanent failure with 429 rate limit error in Daily Pipeline.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow run failed.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves pipeline alert for a permanent failure with 429 rate-limiting error.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Weekly Audit Health Report workflow completely failed.
- [reply needed] Zamzar Limited: Zamzar billing issue requiring payment details update to resolve failed payment processing.
- [reply needed] Andy: Andrew Lang is asking Michael a reflective question about trying to change or fix people.
- [scheduling] Peter Nordlund: Peter Nordlund inviting Matt and Michael to June 19 Scriptural Reasoning event and asking about bringing fruit.
- [scheduling] Alan Beasley: Alan Beasley is sharing a chapter from Mark's book for a Loder Group discussion scheduled for 10am on Saturday, June 27.
- [follow up] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence summary flagging ongoing Zamzar billing issue requiring attention.
